requirements.name: Ai Deciding Evidence Sufficiency As Professional Truth
Ai Selecting Service Provider As Final Decision
Ai Sending External Communication Without Human Review
Api Layer Mutating Domain State Directly
Workflow Layer Creating Active Tasks Outside Task Service
Workflow Layer Emitting Domain Events Directly
Raw Database Ids In Public Responses
Unsafe Stack Traces In Api Responses

acceptanceCriteria.name: Must Build Domains Implemented Or Scaffolded With Tests
Must Build Objects Have Public Reference Ids
Must Build Services Own Behavior
unresolvedReasons: All 18 Service requirements must meet real owning behavior depth.

acceptanceCriteria.name: Must Build Api Validators Exist
unresolvedReasons: All 18 API requirements must prove validators, delegation, and no direct mutation/emission tests.

acceptanceCriteria.name: Customer Intake Workflow Supports Preview Apply
unresolvedReasons: Customer Intake Workflow must prove preview/apply validation.

acceptanceCriteria.name: Trademark Application Workflow Supports Preview Apply
unresolvedReasons: Trademark Application Workflow must prove preview/apply validation.

acceptanceCriteria.name: Communication Review Workflow Supports Preview Apply
unresolvedReasons: Communication Review Workflow must prove preview/apply validation.

acceptanceCriteria.name: Idempotency Replay And Conflict Are Tested
Event Trace Exists And Is Not Command
Api Layer Does Not Emit Events Directly
unresolvedReasons: Executable API negative tests must prove no direct Event emission.

acceptanceCriteria.name: Workflow Layer Does Not Emit Events Directly
unresolvedReasons: Executable Workflow negative tests must prove no direct Event emission.

acceptanceCriteria.name: Agent Layer Does Not Emit Events Directly
unresolvedReasons: Executable Agent negative tests must prove no direct Event emission.

acceptanceCriteria.name: Deferred Items Do Not Block Mvp
Never In Mvp Items Are Not Implemented
